name: AusSeabed per-survey bathymetry grids (0.5 m–440 m, Australian waters)
producer: Geoscience Australia / AusSeabed (surveys by multiple collecting organisations)
license: CC BY 4.0 (per-survey; harvest.py keeps only CC-BY records). GA marks all surveys 'Not to be used for navigational purposes'.
datum: MSL per filename token on modern grids (2 surveys LAT — reads shallower, conservative; older grids untagged) — elevation, seafloor negative, no transform
